reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, pero esta en el centro y carga combustible a camiones y productores con tanques de 3 o 5 mil litros, causando el faltante de combustible a los clientes.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, but it's downtown and fuels trucks and producers with 3 or 5 thousand liter tanks, causing fuel shortages for customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3482801919201175816/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPMXBuREZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención en shop. Buenas opciones de menú para almorzar. Baños limpios pero muy chicos para la cantidad de gente que asiste al lugar.

(Translated by Google)
Good service in the shop. Good lunch menu options. Clean restrooms but very small for the number of people who frequent the place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3482801919201175816/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPLW9hZ3l3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena estación de servicio, con personal bien atento para atender y despachar combustible. El servicio de shop es aceptable, con opciones para almorzar y cenar.

(Translated by Google)
Good gas station, with attentive staff for serving and dispensing fuel. The convenience store service is acceptable, with options for lunch and dinner.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3482801919201175816/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyeHZUcWl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Paramos a cargar combustible y de paso almorzamos,  se come muy bien y el precio accesible, bajo una estrella por los sanitarios, deben estar más atentos respecto de la higiene. No pude ingresar.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to refuel and have lunch along the way. The food is very good and the prices are affordable. One star for the restrooms; they should be more attentive to hygiene. I couldn't get in.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3482801919201175816/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXajRyZVl3EAE
